install_scope: Mac-local LABB user-site Python packages plus Homebrew libomp runtime; not a G2 runtime dependency
label: LABB

model_comparison.comparison_type: same-run for ExtraTrees/LightGBM/XGBoost; P0054D ExtraTrees included as evidence-summary baseline

split_policy.fixed_cet_rule: model_cet_timestamp = timestamp_utc + 1h all year; calendar feature only
